---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
---

A showcase of work in progress and completed projects.

## Research

**Master's Thesis: Outdoor Mindfulness-Based Behavioral Activation**  
Investigating whether natural outdoor settings enhance brief behavioral activation + mindfulness interventions for college students with depression. Longitudinal RCT design (T1/T2/T3), 17 completers, 3 conditions (Control, Indoor, Outdoor). Corrected AAQ-II scoring error discovered and fixed (December 2025). Manuscript in progress.

*Methods:* R for analysis, longitudinal mixed models, psychometric validation  
*Status:* Data collection complete, analysis complete, writing in progress  
*Repo:* Private until publication

**Crisis Intervention Documentation**  
Developing functional analysis frameworks for telephone crisis counseling. Case conceptualization tools using behavioral activation principles for brief, high-acuity interventions.

*Status:* Internal practice development

## Technical

**cole.press** (this site)  
Terminal-inspired personal website built with Quarto. Custom SCSS theme, monospace typography, R-powered dynamic content, GitHub Actions CI/CD.

*Stack:* Quarto, R, SCSS, Netlify  
*Repo:* [github.com/colerehbein/cole_press](https://github.com/colerehbein/cole_press)

**Psychometrics Pipeline** (in development)  
Building tools for personality assessment data processing. Typed ETL pipelines, scale scoring, norming. Not yet public.

*Stack:* Python, Pydantic, SQLite  
*Status:* Private development

## Writing

**Blog**  
Writing on psychology research, clinical practice, and the examined life. Irregular updates as thesis permits.

[Visit blog →](/blog)

## Practice

**Sōtō Zen Study**  
Personal liturgical study project. Working through Soto School scriptures, Dōgen's Shōbōgenzō, and the Zen curriculum. Student-level, not teaching.

*Status:* Private study, no public materials until authorized

---

*Last updated: March 2026*
